title: Epoch RNG fallback yields deterministic 128
description: lichen/subsys/lichen/link/link_ctx.c:81. spec/02-physical-link.md §4.4: epoch MUST initialize to a random value uniformly distributed in [128,255]. The non-Zephyr/non-Linux/non-macOS fallback rand_byte = 0 yields deterministic epoch = 128. Dead code on supported targets (Zephyr sys_csrand_get, POSIX getentropy), and lichen_link_generate_key hard-#errors without a CSPRNG but init does not. Fix: #error or warn in the fallback.
